context: Tests whether the ADAttributionKit skill guides custom-rendered publisher ad implementation without leaking into generic ad SDK advice. The scorer should evaluate only the files produced by the agent, especially adattributionkit-click-through.md.

checklist.name: Framework scope
checklist.description: Uses AdAttributionKit as the framework for the custom install-ad attribution flow rather than generic analytics, App Tracking Transparency, or an ad SDK-only answer.

checklist.name: JWS impression
checklist.description: Creates an AppImpression from a compact JWS or signed impression string before handling the ad interaction.

checklist.name: Support check
checklist.description: Checks AppImpression.isSupported before attempting AppImpression handling APIs.

checklist.name: One attribution view
checklist.description: Places one UIEventAttributionView over each tappable custom ad or control rather than one broad overlay for the whole screen.

checklist.name: Touch interception
checklist.description: States the attribution view must cover the tappable area and not be hidden under another view that intercepts the tap.

checklist.name: Validated tap
checklist.description: Calls handleTap only after a user tap that the attribution view can validate.

checklist.name: Fresh impression
checklist.description: Mentions that click-through handleTap must happen within 15 minutes after creating the AppImpression.

checklist.name: Stale fallback
checklist.description: Recommends requesting or creating a fresh impression when the ad card has become stale or expired before the tap.

checklist.name: StoreKit distinction
checklist.description: Distinguishes custom-rendered handling from StoreKit-rendered ads supplied with an AppImpression.

checklist.name: StoreKit timing
checklist.description: States that StoreKit-rendered ads record view-through impressions after about two seconds of display and clicks on tap.
